name: Chicken and Mushrooms in Orange Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon frozen orange juice concentrate, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. May use 3 large split chicken breasts in place of the chicken.
2. Lightly salt the chicken and broil, skin side up, for 10 minutes.
3. Slice vegetables and spread them in the bottom of a large baking dish.
4. In a saucepan, combine orange juice, water, white wine, cornstarch, and cook over low heat until the sauce thickens. For a stronger orange flavor, add 1 tablespoon frozen orange juice concentrate.
5. Cover the vegetables with chicken and top with sauce.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour, or until the chicken is tender.
7. Sprinkle with grated orange peel for extra flavor and garnish.
